research_basis: ISO/IEC 25010:2023 provides a quality model for specifying, measuring, and evaluating ICT/software product quality.
Google SRE uses SLIs/SLOs and error budgets to define measurable reliability targets and response actions.
rules: NUF must map at least three quality characteristics.
Required categories: reliability, security, determinism, artifact_integrity.
At least one required category must be blocking.
Metrics, thresholds, measurement windows, and verification methods are mandatory.
Placeholder thresholds such as TBD, N/A, unknown, later, varies, or ~ are blocked.
Budget policy must define allowed budget, burn action, and escalation action.
